title: ActiveCampaign vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Moosend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Moosend are both capable email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels as an all-in-one CRM and automation powerhouse, while Moosend offers excellent value for budget-conscious teams seeking straightforward email campaigns. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited emails, landing pages, affordable pricing

choose_a_if: You need integrated CRM functionality and advanced lead scoring capabilities
Your business requires sophisticated automation workflows and site tracking
You're willing to invest more for enterprise-grade features and support
choose_b_if: You're a startup or small business with a limited budget
You want to start with a free plan and upgrade as you grow
You need unlimited email sends and simple, user-friendly automation

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring advanced CRM, lead scoring, and complex automation. Moosend wins for cost-conscious teams and startups who want unlimited emails and simpler workflows. ActiveCampaign has a slight edge in G2 ratings (4.5 vs 4.7 for Moosend), though both platforms are highly rated.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $0 with a free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers, then $9/month for paid plans. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and starts at $15/month. For small businesses, Moosend offers better value; for mid-market companies needing CRM features, ActiveCampaign's price becomes more reasonable relative to its capabilities.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data import and export. You can export your contact lists and campaign history from Moosend and import them into ActiveCampaign. However, advanced automations and CRM data will need to be manually recreated, as these features differ significantly between the two platforms. Most migrations can be completed in a few days.
